testcase.name: test_fit_request_creates_notification

failure.message: AssertionError: No notification found for fit request FIT-20260129-6FFA48 assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:194: in test_fit_request_creates_notification assert len(matching) > 0, f"No notification found for fit request {request_id}" E AssertionError: No notification found for fit request FIT-20260129-6FFA48 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_fit_request_creates_service_desk_ticket

failure.message: AssertionError: No service desk ticket found for fit request FIT-20260129-6FFA48 assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:221: in test_fit_request_creates_service_desk_ticket assert len(matching) > 0, f"No service desk ticket found for fit request {request_id}" E AssertionError: No service desk ticket found for fit request FIT-20260129-6FFA48 E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_notifications_have_read_field

failure.message: AssertionError: Notification NOTIF-619DB4B8 missing 'read' field assert 'read' in {'action_url': '/admin/concierge?request=conc-8594bcd9', 'concierge_request_id': 'conc-8594bcd9', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T13:04:36.455000', 'customer': {'email': 'endpoint_test_a6d35d@test.com', 'name': 'Endpoint Test', 'phone': None}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:302: in test_notifications_have_read_field assert "read" in notif, f"Notification {notif.get('id')} missing 'read' field" E AssertionError: Notification NOTIF-619DB4B8 missing 'read' field E assert 'read' in {'action_url': '/admin/concierge?request=conc-8594bcd9', 'concierge_request_id': 'conc-8594bcd9', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T13:04:36.455000', 'customer': {'email': 'endpoint_test_a6d35d@test.com', 'name': 'Endpoint Test', 'phone': None}, ...}
